title: Insurance Domain Chatbot on Existing Microservices
summary: Built a domain-focused insurance chatbot by orchestrating existing enterprise microservices and integrating Amazon Bedrock with Anthropic models for grounded, task-oriented responses.
highlights: Reused existing backend service APIs instead of creating duplicate business logic, improving maintainability and consistency.
Designed prompt and tool-call flows to convert user intent into microservice actions across insurance workflows.
Implemented response guardrails and fallback handling for safer and more reliable production behavior.

title: AI-Powered Gmail Cleanup Utility
summary: Created a personal productivity utility that applied sentiment and intent analysis to approximately 16,000 unread emails and automated cleanup and prioritization.
highlights: Classified emails by sentiment and category to identify actionable, informational, and low-priority content.
Automated cleanup rules for archiving, labeling, and grouping to reduce inbox noise.
Generated concise summaries to speed up review of important communication.

title: Agent-Based Production Diagnostics with AWS MCP
summary: Built autonomous agents that interact with official AWS MCP capabilities to diagnose production incidents and post first-pass analysis comments into Azure DevOps work items.
highlights: Automated investigation across CloudWatch logs and internal pod logs to identify probable failure points.
Generated primary incident summaries with probable root-cause indicators and remediation suggestions.
Reduced manual triage effort by integrating diagnostics output directly into DevOps collaboration workflows.
